summary: Restored the real framework sql command (an earlier novel_features entry had made the generator stub and shadow it) and case-folded the corpus/author-compare join key to fix silent-empty results.
reason: sql and search are FRAMEWORK commands. Listing sql in research.json novel_features made the generator emit a novel-command stub ('TODO: implement novel feature sql') that shadowed the working framework command; internal/cli/sql.go was hand-restored to the real read-only SQL command. Separately, corpus/author-compare joined publications by a host key whose casing differed between writer and reader, so the join silently returned empty; internal/cli/corpus.go now case-folds the join key. Candidate upstream generator report (framework command in novel_features gets stubbed and shadows the real one).
validated_outcome: Read-only SQL over the local corpus verified live; author-compare returns non-empty joins across two archived publications; hermetic tests cover the case-fold.
